title: tribulus parvispinus
intro: Tribulus parvispinus is a plant species in the family Zygophyllaceae, commonly known as a type of spiny caltrop. The medicinal properties of Tribulus parvispinus include its high content of flavonoids, alkaloids, and saponins, which have been reported to have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Tribulus parvispinus are thought to include improved cardiovascular health, enhanced athletic performance, and potential anti-aging properties. Tribulus parvispinus is often prepared as a herbal supplement in capsule or powder form, and is also used in traditional medicine in some parts of the world to treat various ailments.
